items.example: I had to make a speech at my friend's wedding.
Don't worry, everyone makes mistakes sometimes.
I need to make a decision about which course to take.
Please don't make a noise — the baby is sleeping.
You should make an effort to arrive on time.
Our company does business with clients in Europe.
I usually do my homework in the evening.
My brother and I share the housework equally.
I'm doing a course in graphic design this year.
Could you do me a favour and open the window?
